name: Weld, Bill
subject: no super pacs, just you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRcVgrKM3UwAXaUVFPk7Bnq4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=1)
Team — See the countdown clock? We’re getting closer and closer to Super Tuesday, and your help is needed now more than ever.
We’re going up against a lot of money in this race. Donald Trump has the support of Super PACs working to stifle any opposition to the president. And us? I’m relying on the support of you, the people, to help power this campaign.
It hasn’t been easy — kind of like bringing a knife to a gunfight — but if we are truly going to restore faith and dignity to the presidency, I want to make sure **_no one_** can question who I’m working for.
That’s why we’ve been emailing you so much and asking you to help fund our campaign. We are 100% powered by your support and are relying on that to propel us to victory on Super Tuesday.
The truth is, March 3rd could be our last chance to send Trump’s re-election efforts into a downward spiral. We made waves in New Hampshire, and if we can’t capitalize on that momentum in a couple of weeks, we run the risk of failing on our central mission:**saving our democracy from the tyrant in the White House.**
So, Friend, that is why I am asking you to help us succeed by making a contribution to our campaign today. Every dollar you send us is another dollar we’re putting into the field in key communities across Super Tuesday states. [**Do you think you could help us today by chipping in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRcVgrKM3UwAXaUVFPk7Bnq4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=2)
| [DONATE →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRZogf7rq2UlA_Ehzbs93WkI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=3)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200220_frs&n=7), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ramiro=20Ojeda=2C=20Field=20Director=2C=20Marc=20Flores=20for=20Congress?=
subject: The most valuable way to help
body:
My friends,
With early voting under way, nothing is more important than continuing to remind voters of what we stand for, and why Marc is running to represent District 18.

You have already given so much, be it time, energy, or donations, and it is about to pay off. We have spoken with many voters who are excited to vote for Marc.

Right now, the most important thing I can ask of you is that you come out over the next few days, and volunteer (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927) for one of our many shifts coming up.
Sign up to Volunteer! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)
We have many volunteer opportunities available, depending on what you'd like to do. These include:
* Block Walking
* Phone Banking
* Text Banking
* Working at Poll Stations

Please reply to this email, or click here (http://marcfloresforcongres.com/volunteer?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927) , if you would like to volunteer for an event! Volunteering is the most valuable way to help us out right now.
If you are unable to volunteer right now, I understand. It is a busy time, and we all have commitments and responsibilities. If this is the case, I ask that you please donate (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927) , to keep the campaign moving forward.
Contribute Here (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)
As Marc has always said, we can do better, but we must work together to do so. Join the movement (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927) today, and help us make Marc the first Latino representative of this district!

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=272f91617d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_20_05_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-272f91617d-32267927)

Thank you for everything, now let's do better for District 18,

Ramiro Ojeda
Field Director
Marc Flores for Congress

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Can you give $1 or $2? (12 days until the primary!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
There are just 12 days left until the primary and we are doing everything we can to win this race. But I'll get straight to the point: I need your help.

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c35/4292760557/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Friend,

There are just 12 days left until the primary and we are doing everything we can to win this race. But I'll get straight to the point: [_**I need your help. Will you give $1 or $2 today to help us have the resources we need to finish strong?**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c36/4292760557/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200220-1-EM&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250")
---

| [$12 ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c39/4292760557/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?recurring=false&refcode=BLU-SJC-20200220-1-EM&express_lane=true&amount=12")

| [I'LL GIVE MORE! ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c3a/4292760557/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200220-1-EM&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250")

People are already voting (I cast my ballot last week!) and we still have so much to do.
[](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c3a/4292760557/VEsB/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200220-1-EM&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250")
One of the most important things we have to do is make sure our TV and internet ads keep running so we can reach as many people as possible. Anything you can chip in helps us spread our message for change. [_**Give $1, $2, or $12 today so we can celebrate a victory in just 12 days.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c36/4292760557/VEsO/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200220-1-EM&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250")

Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ee/27c6da69/2b399717/12f0c3c/4292760557/VEsHAQ/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_

name: Team Mike
subject: This weekend, you can help us beat Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Time for a Weekend of Action.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=730eff27d0344f16b5aaf415993b022e&_e=ONByLiPJjn_zkO9NX0Fg0cV3eEVyTGGjZQ3eir6D6xka0cua3-Ce70XbQT5cVE3Ht1FFa1C9BHCBHUgZfiYk9zOOvvCrW54KCt2LV-ADCykisarexscOeOy8L7mpzZMU2Jw9EZ7AotySkdNmDUCBlgreGqF5cRaRfzTrU6WrXzg5es7f1ejnanJV3h-b12WCPW0oGxJWMLzj2O3hju_x25Ru9s7GvMDZFLhH_13wXkAcgxe9BW-Q1STLVG2V3K3EJMotqxIsfJl_QMCy6iRqS-Eaa0SITPDaTBfM4QrCzq-zveNmxva6vmi1zZexSKO8rEcFtaUAxzOEjnWCQALAVZ9eOnNVpUrL0MBle_6xc0Ypn2QIOzSqnzRe509wbbsk) Friend -- There were a lot of attacks thrown at Mike at last night's Democratic debate -- in fact, it took less than a minute for the other candidates to start to go after him. But what differentiated Mike from the others is the same thing that makes this campaign different. Mike stayed focused on what's important -- defeating President Trump and unifying the country -- and that's what we're doing too. This Saturday and Sunday, we're holding a Weekend of Action across the country -- calling voters, knocking on doors, hosting events and more -- to get the word out that Mike is the only Democrat who can and will beat Trump. [**Take a look at events near you and pledge to join in.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=730eff27d0344f16b5aaf415993b022e&_e=ONByLiPJjn_zkO9NX0Fg0cV3eEVyTGGjZQ3eir6D6xka0cua3-Ce70XbQT5cVE3Ht1FFa1C9BHCBHUgZfiYk9zOOvvCrW54KCt2LV-ADCykisarexscOeOy8L7mpzZMU2Jw9EZ7AotySkdNmDUCBlgreGqF5cRaRfzTrU6WrXzjg0ouWNFAhsHgsYT8F_8tnCgUEwipDdfb198zFrk4nboZ-6L5BB-TRCNmqYRGUsUBhmtdCPra1_RiqtftNwNlfjCUjefautv6nHwXgce7dq_1TJBquHvzvi1VT0iQpD0Vc3LZ74d_zUxWLf-Rw3rqoF1eY7s9KxAQKfKqySqINQHFNp6Ax8m6gyM6WkizCT9FVEtXUQaTIdJXXT0iI_i9i) Mike has the record and the experience we need to put America back on track, restore dignity to the White House, and lead with both humility and decisiveness. RSVP for a Weekend of Action event and help our team get the word out and build on our momentum. If you haven't been to a Weekend of Action event before, give it a try! You can choose what you'd like to do, whether that's sending texts, getting out in the fresh air for some canvassing, or just coming out to show your support. **Join the Weekend of Action at an event near you:** [**https://events.mikebloomberg.com**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=730eff27d0344f16b5aaf415993b022e&_e=ONByLiPJjn_zkO9NX0Fg0cV3eEVyTGGjZQ3eir6D6xka0cua3-Ce70XbQT5cVE3Ht1FFa1C9BHCBHUgZfiYk9zOOvvCrW54KCt2LV-ADCykisarexscOeOy8L7mpzZMU2Jw9EZ7AotySkdNmDUCBlgreGqF5cRaRfzTrU6WrXzhB-Y-obA6vbO0ipcrLTSV6dlsGEHqtdIpwfIkyT4MdrZIK9v4fzati01mNTOWcFRgK6ZGjZMo9g-m91NIv7BvEjDztX4KyuW8XDYlzedZvMkNhbdsOuctXtrOYkcmZ0tVtAMGy-gMbV8Yy8UAa3OqgL1A6HylM3VuU52oshLWBN4cAb_oRlE-IYt9z-oakAE602MoFRd9-lybiUHf8Uutf) We'll see you out there, Team Mike
---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: TRUMP: Cory Gardner "has been with us 100%"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- Donald Trump just left the stage after hosting a lavish fundraiser and rally for my Republican opponent -- reminding Colorado voters tonight that Senator Cory Gardner _ "has been with us 100%."_ Here's the truth: our state deserves an independent leader who will stand with working families, not Trump and McConnell or the partisan politics that dominate Washington today. We deserve better. That's why I'm running for Senate, and that's why Donald Trump and Cory Gardner are working so hard to defeat our campaign. We're the Democrats' best chance to flip a GOP seat in November, which is why I'm asking: **Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to my campaign before Trump leaves Colorado? Your support will show the president and our Republican opponent that we 're ready to fight back and flip this Senate seat:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200219?refcode=em-200220-post-rally-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200219?refcode=em-200220-post-rally-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Team Tina
subject: One week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200220-oneweek?refcode=em200220-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") In exactly one week, Donald Trump Jr. will host a high-dollar fundraiser for Tina's GOP opponent, Jason Lewis.

Look, our campaign isn't about rubbing elbows with GOP mega-donors and currying favor with corporate billionaires in exchange for campaign checks.

Our campaign is about _you_ and representing your interests in Washington. That's why we ask you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford, at a time.

**Tina knows this incredible grassroots team can match these fat cats and shadowy players dollar for dollar. So, we're asking you to rush a donation of $10 or more before Trump Jr. gets here to save Minnesota's Senate seat and protect our state from flipping red:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200220-oneweek?refcode=em200220-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

The other side may have a rolodex full of wealthy donors at their disposal, but we have grassroots supporters like you to help us fight back and pull this thing off.

Trump and his allies will spend whatever they need to flip Minnesota red, which means we can't afford to take anything for granted. Not for a second. **[Pitch in today, if you can.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200220-oneweek?refcode=em200220-oneweek&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks!

-- Team Tina

subject: re: negative ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15251804/160808162/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzN2MzZS1iYjU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z8h5EMYNlbxONo1bY6qrGDhfN18Hrhq5GK0QVg5Vxg0=&emci=91f37c3e-bb54-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=95f37c3e-bb54-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

This campaign is showing the people of TX-10 what real representation looks like: fighting for voting rights, building coalitions to address climate change, showing up for workers and immigrant families and people without a voice.

And we are gaining steam by the day: hundreds of volunteers have helped us knock on 34,000 doors so far, and each weekend more people get involved. It’s looking good for March 3!

Unfortunately, not everyone is on the same wavelength. **In the last two weeks, a powerful new kind of Super PAC that can raise unlimited funds has spent over $200,000 on this race. And the PAC has sent two district-wide mailers this week, with a very negative message.**

The negative mailers have attacked Shannon Hutcheson, one of my primary election opponents. The same PAC has also sent positive mailers for Pritesh Gandhi, another opponent.

**I’m sending out this note in part because I’ve been asked if I sent these mailers. The answer is no. Rather, this is the work of “314 Action,” a DC-based group. They support my opponent, Gandhi. **

One of the fundamental problems with our political system is how unlimited corporate money can distort elections. I’ve refused to accept any corporate PAC money. And I support the repeal of _Citizens United_ — the Supreme Court decision that allows this PAC to intervene in our race.

I’m confident that we’ve built the coalition that will not only win the Democratic nomination, but will send McCaul to an early retirement this fall. And we’ve built this coalition with people power—no corporate money—to make sure that I’ll be representing your concerns, and only your concerns, when I get to Congress.

Onward and upward,
Mike

| Wednesday evening, we heard Democrats attack each other left and right. Bloomberg called Bernie a communist and Bernie attacked his rivals for not being socialist enough. name: Charles Booker
subject: This is wild
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
That’s how we’re going to win. That’s how we’re finally going to send Mitch McConnell into retirement. 63% of Kentuckians want a change -- and, with your support, we’ll give them that change.
#
This is wild --
Did you know that only 37% of Kentuckians approve of the job Mitch McConnell is doing? **37%!** That means 63% of us want someone better.
If he’s that unpopular, why does Mitch McConnell keep getting re-elected? Well, it’s because the Democratic Party establishment thinks the only way we can win is if we run like Republicans.
Look, we’re not going to beat Republicans by acting like Republicans. We’ve tried that, and every time we try it, **we lose**. We lose when we refuse to embrace bold new ideas. We lose when we fail to talk to folks who don’t vote often, or at all. We lose when working people don’t see anyone standing up and fighting for them.
I’m not going to follow that failed playbook. I know that the only way we win -- **the only way we finally beat Mitch McConnell** \-- is if we unapologetically stand up for what we believe in and lead the fight for progressive change.
I’m ready to lead that fight -- **but I can’t do it alone**. We’re going to need a grassroots army to spread the word to every community in Kentucky that we have what it takes to beat Mitch McConnell. [**Will you join that grassroots army by making a gift to our campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254653/160832270/1360887819?refcode=em20200221&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254666/160832283/1360887819?refcode=em20200221&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=)**
Speaking of standing up for what we believe in: I’ve embraced the Green New Deal. I’m a proud supporter of Medicare for All. And I’m committed to running a 100% grassroots-powered campaign that takes nothing from corporate PACs or special interests.
That’s because I don’t want to answer to the powerful or the wealthy or the well-connected -- **that’s what Mitch McConnell does**. I want to answer to you, the people, and _only_ you. I want to embrace bold new ideas without worrying what some wealthy donor, establishment figurehead, or DC consultant thinks.
**That’s how we’re going to win**. That’s how we’re finally going to send Mitch McConnell into retirement. 63% of Kentuckians want a change. With your support, we’ll give them that change.
[**Please give whatever you can sacrifice to grow this grassroots movement and take our message of bold, progressive change to every community in Kentucky.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254667/160832284/1360887819?refcode=em20200221&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=)
Together, we can ditch Mitch. Are you in?
Charles Booker

**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254668/160832285/1360887819?refcode=em20200221-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254669/160832286/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=&emci=a78c97a0-bd54-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=98fdea61-c354-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254670/160832287/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=&emci=a78c97a0-bd54-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=98fdea61-c354-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15254671/160832288/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZkZWE2MS1jMzU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35gctuXOXkVPfkv-9A-ERYCvQJ0KPSYgJB10anEaKmE=&emci=a78c97a0-bd54-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=98fdea61-c354-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=2635570)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Democrats Take Action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
REP. CHRIS TODD ADMITTED
HE NEVER HAD A SCIENCE CLASS
Republican Chris Todd opposed Rep. John Ray Clemmons resolution about the Cumberland Plateau’s beauty because it states sandstone shale there is 500 million years old. "I don’t believe we have any solid evidence the Earth is that old." We're not sure if he's never had a science class, or, if he insists on a harmful, divisive partisan approach . Watch the video now. [https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/2316600935303889/]
https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/2316600935303889/ [https://www.facebook.com/TheTNHoller/videos/2316600935303889/]
LAST CHANCE: STAND WITH
TNDP VETERANS AND
MILITARY FAMILIES CAUCUS
http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn [http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn]
The Tennessee Democratic Party Veterans and Military Families Caucus released an open letter to demand Republican Senator Marsha Blackburn apologize for her attacks on Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman. Instead of defending the decorated veteran and his sacrifices for our country, Senator Blackburn contributed to the witness intimidation by sending a series of tweets questioning his patriotism that ultimately resulting in the loss of Lt. Col. Vindman’s job. The letter denounces Senator Blackburn’s actions and asks her to apologize for treating a member of the military in such a disrespectful way. All Tennesseeans are invited to stand with Veterans and Military Families by signing the letter denouncing Senator Blackburn's behavior. Sign the letter now! [http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn]
VOTE IN THE PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY
At the beginning of this week, we celebrate the leadership of the highest office in the land - The President of the United States of America. We cannot celebrate the legacy and impact left by those before without also recognizing the mockery made of the office the past 4 years. In 15 days, we’ll head to the polls to cast our vote for who will be our Democratic Presidential Nominee and ultimately the next president. But you don’t have to wait for March 3rd! Make your plan (Will you go in the morning before work? At lunch? After work with your kiddos)? and early vote today! Check your registration, find your polling site, and make a plan to vote. [http://bit.ly/tnvote20]
http://bit.ly/tnvote20 [http://bit.ly/tnvote20]
TNDP BLUE COCKTAIL: MEMPHIS
https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/ [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]
Join us on Thursday, March 26th from 6:00-8:00 PM CT for the TNDP Blue Cocktail Memphis in support of our 2020 candidate recruitment and support program. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward supporting and empowering Democratic candidates in 2020. Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available! Register now! [https://www.facebook.com/events/638111180345800/]
LISTEN NOW: TNDP PODCAST
At the DNC Convention this July in Milwaukee, Tennessee's 73 Delegates are expected to be a deciding influence in the race for the Democratic Presidential Nomination. In this episode, Now You Know host and TNDP Chair, Mary Mancini, sits down with TNDP Party Affairs Director Maria Brewer to discuss the Delegate Selection Process, its history, and why it's important to our democracy. Listen Now! [http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast]
http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast [http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast]
Last week, we spoke with Tennessee Advocates for Planned Parenthood Executive Director, Francie Hunt. Give it a listen - Now You Know: Women's Reproductive Rights [https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/if-you-dont-know-now-you-know/id1457122141]
Stand with families, women, and caregivers. Support reproductive rights and Tennessee Advocates for Planned Parenthood by signing their open letter to Governor Bill Lee. [https://www.weareplannedparenthoodaction.org/onlineactions/9RE-959GJU6_azhk8OThlw2]
HELP PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Voter%20Protection%20Training%20%281%29.png]
We're a week and a half into early voting and already we have received several reports of voter suppression. Find out how you can help protect the vote and ensure everyone's voice is heard at the polls this year. These training sessions will teach you the basics of voter protection and how to become a poll watcher on Super Tuesday, March 3rd 2020. Register for an event near you now:
*
Nashville
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2945267235494971/]
*
Knoxville
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2442545592674567/]
*
Chattanooga
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2290077751297104/]
*
Memphis
[http://www.facebook.com/events/200449217762779/]
ATTEND A COUNTY CONVENTION
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Square%20timeline%20graphic.%20COUNTY%20CONVENTION%20%281%29.png]
The Congressional District DNC Delegate Application closed Thursday at noon. Now, it's time to select which delegates will represent you at the 2020 DNC Convention. It's more important now than ever to get involved in your party!
Visit the TNDP Calendar to find your County Convention! [https://tndp.org/find-an-event/]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
https://twitter.com/DyerCountyDem [https://twitter.com/DyerCountyDem]
https://twitter.com/nashvilledems?lang=en [https://twitter.com/nashvilledems?lang=en]
RALLY WITH TEACHERS, STUDENTS, AND FAMILIES
Join teachers, parents, and public education advocates on Monday, March 16th at the Capitol for a "Rally for Our Schools." This rally will be to remind legislators of their duty and oath to serve public schools and to demand they remember students' and teachers' best interest while making laws. Register now! [http://www.teateachers.org/rally]
TAKE ACTION
The most impactful thing you can do to make the change you want to see in Tennessee, is to vote. But we also have to have strong candidates running good campaigns if we want to win and that's where your investment in our work is crucial. It’s expensive to maintain and expand TNDP operations in an election year. Paying for things like election protection training, candidate recruitment efforts, and campaign support are expensive – that’s why every dollar you contribute helps us win elections and fight back.
Thank you!

Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: It's time ⏰
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VYh3enDXMUQ&feature=youtu.be&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=58411d3c5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-58411d3c5c-32267927

Good Morning Peter,

Voting is the most important action you can take to help our community grow and change for the better. As a native Houstonian, I have seen the challenges we face like flooding, lack of affordable healthcare and poorly funded schools. It is time we take action! Head to the polls and cast your vote for me. We can do better.
Why Should I Vote For You?
I know the issues our community faces and have a plan of action.
Read about it here (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=58411d3c5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-58411d3c5c-32267927)

Where Can I Vote?
Find my polling location (https://www.harrisvotes.com/EarlyVoting?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=58411d3c5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_11_05_43_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-58411d3c5c-32267927)

What Do I Need to Bring?
One of the following forms of identification:
* A state driver's license issued by the Texas Department of Public Safety (DPS)
* A Texas election identification certificate (issued by DPS)
* A Texas personal identification card (issued by DPS)
* A Texas license to carry a handgun (issued by DPS)
* A U.S. Military ID card with a personal photo
* A U.S. citizenship certificate with a personal photo
* A U.S. passport

Thank you for your support, I'll see you at the polls!

~Marc

name: Ambassador Andrew Young
subject: Paschal’s
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | **** | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15261061/160884218/664205141?refcode=em022120-a&refcode2=c5470804-d554-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ3MDgwNC1kNTU0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHmPE1ktcHIVZOtO5VQF8pd6pPMJnHdokBYnuDQXsm0=)** Friend,

I'd like to share with you a short story. It's about a restaurant called Paschal's in Atlanta. If you will give me a moment to explain, it will all make sense.

You see, in Atlanta in the 1960s, on the street that later became Martin Luther King Drive, Paschal's wasn't just a restaurant. It was one of the only places where all people – black and white, young and old, gay and straight – could sit together. While our brothers and sisters in the movement were putting their bodies on the line to desegregate lunch counters across the South, Paschal's "Colored Only" business and liquor licenses did not apply because they let anybody – black or white or brown – walk through their doors and share a table.

Paschal's became our home, our office, and our headquarters for the Civil Rights Movement. It's where we went to bring poor people together, no matter their ethnicity, to organize for justice.

So it was a great honor to join Teresa and her campaign at Paschal's this week, along with many of the wonderful women in the movement who helped me with my campaigns. I can only express to you the hopefulness that filled me seeing so many of us come together and to feel the extraordinary energy of this campaign for the United States Senate in Georgia.

We need somebody that's going to pull us together. And talking to people in our movement across Georgia, I know Teresa is the one who's ready to lift us up a little higher. We don't know exactly where that is yet, and we don't have to predict it. And the reason why is this:

To quote Reverend Ralph Abernathy, "I don't know what the future holds, and I really don't care, cause I know who holds the future." And when we trust our future to a wise, wonderful, dedicated woman like Teresa, we're in good hands because we're in God's hands.

Friends, we have the power to win this election and lift each other up a little higher. clean_body: | | | | ** | | = Friend, I'd like to share with you a short story. It's about a restaurant called Paschal's in Atlanta. If you will give me a moment to explain, it will all make sense. You see, in Atlanta in the 1960s, on the street that later became Martin Luther King Drive, Paschal's wasn't just a restaurant. It was one of the only places where all people – black and white, young and old, gay and straight – could sit together. While our brothers and sisters in the movement were putting their bodies on the line to desegregate lunch counters across the South, Paschal's "Colored Only" business and liquor licenses did not apply because they let anybody – black or white or brown – walk through their doors and share a table. Paschal's became our home, our office, and our headquarters for the Civil Rights Movement. It's where we went to bring poor people together, no matter their ethnicity, to organize for justice. So it was a great honor to join Teresa and her campaign at Paschal's this week, along with many of the wonderful women in the movement who helped me with my campaigns. I can only express to you the hopefulness that filled me seeing so many of us come together and to feel the extraordinary energy of this campaign for the United States Senate in Georgia. We need somebody that's going to pull us together. And talking to people in our movement across Georgia, I know Teresa is the one who's ready to lift us up a little higher. We don't know exactly where that is yet, and we don't have to predict it. And the reason why is this: To quote Reverend Ralph Abernathy, "I don't know what the future holds, and I really don't care, cause I know who holds the future." And when we trust our future to a wise, wonderful, dedicated woman like Teresa, we're in good hands because we're in God's hands. Friends, we have the power to win this election and lift each other up a little higher. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Thank you for your support and for everything you continue to do for this campaign. Thank you, Andrew Young PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906

name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MrkbBaveo2GoIrgHO-u8UYg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=1)
| The Supreme Court will hear a total of nine cases between February 24 - March 4, 2020. The cases relate to subjects such as restricting abortion, immigration, and the separation of powers, among others. **Here are three cases this month that are worth noting:**
1. June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health
Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health v. June Medical Service
2. United States v. Sineng-Smith
3. Seila Law LLC v. Consumer Protection Bureau

#### June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health
**Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health v. June Medical Service**
This consolidated case before the U.S. Supreme Court includes two different cases involving the same parties. In June 2014, Act 620 became Louisiana law. The law requires doctors conducting abortions to have admitting privileges at a hospital within 30 miles of the abortion facility. The doctors must be able to provide surgical and diagnostic services at the hospital. The law’s purpose was to bring abortionists under the same requirements as other doctors in ambulatory surgical centers, to ensure all abortionists have proper credentials to conduct an abortion and to help women receive adequate care. Two months after Act 620 became law, June Medical Services, along with others, filed a lawsuit claiming the law was unconstitutional because it placed an [“undue burden on women’s right to choose abortion before viability.”](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=5L1foGIr-8N7xpHJLds-U7HWXe8zEXOZyOsL9WTWy4diY3fSp0_TWrOOtaNb1V7Wg58nNpWxBqrqDg7K6iytLhzeIFtS8SchQ1RRRNQVPKk29V_bSbsF5flKuCvxVn2-gdAwnvYdiV4S6VXWwteoQ7d2q4JpxES8wu0VWOQK6BPCRAigA5E2KP9kW3yEozAl&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=2) This case will have a significant impact on the interpretation of future abortion cases. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MlZ057mERC2MYL7Q_Xu58KA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=3). **The central question in this case:** [Is it unconstitutional that doctors conducting abortions be required to have admitting privileges and be able to do surgical and diagnostic services at a hospital within 30 miles of the abortion facility?](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hD0wK-q4MdYhZbV2kmWYVmveY9kv8CteVQ6OzsraijHS4tn2hARQyHNoPtsAjxZjNw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=4) Oral arguments for this case will be heard on March 4, 2020.
#### United States v. Sineneng-Smith
Evelyn Sineneng-Smith is a law school graduate, but not a licensed attorney, who was convicted of mail fraud for inducing illegal immigrants for financial gain. She ran an immigration consulting firm in California, New York, and Las Vegas for nearly 20 years. One of the services she offered was helping illegal citizens adjust their legal status under Section 245(i) of the INA to obtain green cards while physically already in the United States. This process poses a problem because noncitizens bypass applying for a visa at a U.S. consulate overseas; and non-citizens residing in the U.S. illegally are prohibited from obtaining visas. Two-thousand of Sineneng-Smith’s clients never received a green card. The law currently imposes [criminal penalties](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=dw19u388pVqd5EnvMpv9a7gNoWYJHnOVjU5Ak8sNIYS3Y5j5n6x3cufBh0tBbGEZYkhnR3i34W9UrO_f1rDvrpcWl2UvIfMBUle8EYfa2TfQvHAbuqT-y6N5eR9-35YFhmYJkxwRxxMD6txB3IUDRQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=5) on any person who “encourages or induces an alien to come to, enter, or reside in the United States, knowing or in reckless disregard of the fact that such coming to, entry, or residence in is or will be in violation of law.” Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MXNIjVxjYW2m9-artr1umOA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=6). **The central question in this case:**[Whether the federal criminal prohibition against encouraging or inducing illegal immigration for commercial advantage or private financial gain, in violation of 8 U.S.C. 1324(a)(1)(A)(iv) and (B)(i), is facially unconstitutional. ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hKGaJATmaYgTaOxS-oNKk-B4OFGwrnWhdUxYLPL5jAhSDrEYnUuH-fMzL-0H39lupA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=7)Oral arguments for this case will be heard on February 25, 2020.
#### Seila Law LLC v. Consumer Protection Bureau
The ruling, in this case, will determine if the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is constitutional. The bureau regulates banks and other financial companies providing services to consumers. The independent agency was created back in 2010, and Congress established it to be headed by a single director who is protected from at-will termination by the president of the United States. This means that the [president cannot remove the director except “for cause”](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ASM5fkbU8kXbxv9A8lU5_WAw0Q7T81TqZMwnSm3vjXQRCRbnR_QltrQQFtHPV7z825jJgmAkaX19NjamwV2gjyHev3iEZXXizwZqpFhG9sIP0dbB4Iv7EibehbTXq6Fg-Ss53QTfuhDrpdAog03BXirJhGtSI9TPvRvEJoCp_io&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=8) that is, “inefficiency, neglect of duty, or malfeasance in office.” A California law firm, Seila Law, sued the federal government, arguing Congress violated the separation of powers by granting the director of the bureau tremendous power without making him directly accountable to the president. Both the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 9th Circuit and the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit upheld the bureau’s structure. They ruled that the “for-cause” removal restriction would not ultimately prohibit the president from ensuring the laws are executed. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7Mu8Iq-aNGskuaJR533LrZUg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=9). **The central question in this case:** [Whether the vesting of substantial executive authority in the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, an independent agency led by a single director, violates the separation of powers. (2) If the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is found unconstitutional on the basis of the separation of powers, can 12 U.S.C. §5491(c)(3) be severed from the Dodd-Frank Act?](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hHzty9_moL3iHf-dTbM26GIMJfGWTeshj0HrYU1Y_JtPbvvekDPfjMuKlFH6ki5GT0b5kd7WeKn2xG7PvS9rim4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=10) Oral arguments for this case will be heard on March 3, 2020. Please continue to pray for our Supreme Court Justices this month. Also, please pray for the unborn--those who can’t speak for themselves. Pray specifically for the June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Sec., LA Dept. of Health case being heard by the U.S. Supreme Court on March 4, 2020. The following Scripture reminds us that we are each intricately made and that God knew us before we were conceived. We encourage you to pray that God’s truth becomes the reality in our nation and around the world. | | _“For You formed my inward parts; You wove me in my mother’s womb. I will give thanks to You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; Wonderful are Your works, and my soul knows it very well.”_ Psalm 139:13-14
---|---
**United. We Stand.**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200221com01&n=11)

clean_body: | | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court | The Supreme Court will hear a total of nine cases between February 24 - March 4, 2020. The cases relate to subjects such as restricting abortion, immigration, and the separation of powers, among others. Here are three cases this month that are worth noting: 1. June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health v. June Medical Service 2. United States v. Sineng-Smith 3. Seila Law LLC v. Consumer Protection Bureau June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health Russo, Interim Secretary Labor Department of Health v. June Medical Service This consolidated case before the U.S. Supreme Court includes two different cases involving the same parties. In June 2014, Act 620 became Louisiana law. The law requires doctors conducting abortions to have admitting privileges at a hospital within 30 miles of the abortion facility. The doctors must be able to provide surgical and diagnostic services at the hospital. The law’s purpose was to bring abortionists under the same requirements as other doctors in ambulatory surgical centers, to ensure all abortionists have proper credentials to conduct an abortion and to help women receive adequate care. Two months after Act 620 became law, June Medical Services, along with others, filed a lawsuit claiming the law was unconstitutional because it placed an This case will have a significant impact on the interpretation of future abortion cases. Read the full analysis . The central question in this case: Oral arguments for this case will be heard on March 4, 2020. United States v. Sineneng-Smith Evelyn Sineneng-Smith is a law school graduate, but not a licensed attorney, who was convicted of mail fraud for inducing illegal immigrants for financial gain. She ran an immigration consulting firm in California, New York, and Las Vegas for nearly 20 years. One of the services she offered was helping illegal citizens adjust their legal status under Section 245(i) of the INA to obtain green cards while physically already in the United States. This process poses a problem because noncitizens bypass applying for a visa at a U.S. consulate overseas; and non-citizens residing in the U.S. illegally are prohibited from obtaining visas. Two-thousand of Sineneng-Smith’s clients never received a green card. The law currently imposes on any person who “encourages or induces an alien to come to, enter, or reside in the United States, knowing or in reckless disregard of the fact that such coming to, entry, or residence in is or will be in violation of law.” Read the full analysis . The central question in this case: arguments for this case will be heard on February 25, 2020. Seila Law LLC v. Consumer Protection Bureau The ruling, in this case, will determine if the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is constitutional. The bureau regulates banks and other financial companies providing services to consumers. The independent agency was created back in 2010, and Congress established it to be headed by a single director who is protected from at-will termination by the president of the United States. This means that the that is, “inefficiency, neglect of duty, or malfeasance in office.” A California law firm, Seila Law, sued the federal government, arguing Congress violated the separation of powers by granting the director of the bureau tremendous power without making him directly accountable to the president. Both the U.S. Court of Appeals for the 9th Circuit and the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit upheld the bureau’s structure. They ruled that the “for-cause” removal restriction would not ultimately prohibit the president from ensuring the laws are executed. Read the full analysis . The central question in this case: Oral arguments for this case will be heard on March 3, 2020. Please continue to pray for our Supreme Court Justices this month. Also, please pray for the unborn--those who can’t speak for themselves. Pray specifically for the June Medical Services v. Russo, Interim Sec., LA Dept. of Health case being heard by the U.S. Supreme Court on March 4, 2020. The following Scripture reminds us that we are each intricately made and that God knew us before we were conceived. We encourage you to pray that God’s truth becomes the reality in our nation and around the world. | | “For You formed my inward parts; You wove me in my mother’s womb. I will give thanks to You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; Wonderful are Your works, and my soul knows it very well.” Psalm 139:13-14 ---|--- United. We Stand. * You subscribed mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below. © 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States

AOC and _Courage to Change_ are working to elect a new generation of progressive leaders — community leaders, activists, and working-class candidates.

They’re supporting individuals who don’t necessarily come from money or influential backgrounds, but have a track record of fighting for progressive values.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I ruffled some feathers on “The View”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x2NRKFnnB52d1aP5QtkOWn6lVNadSJeW9W-6z7GfUW3yUrhSZDfeQ-eW3eIG2WnQbwUgPurNT63Yr1ZJuKKJJMiVSDei3Hhj9spLkNkJLJWv5Lu-85I_krnzMXH2ZyI5pOnm9NJWGWv1Ovh1U_pUPwXMz3oh7taqWQJeqT_SR14=&c=2bqyY2wxuwldOYvV0wM8gsnWETjvNZM3r2bizC13B3BsOv9LVMpMCw==&ch=acrH2gPBj38jIY3dxCOdYvvGiRTDLU0Gh891xOHXBJHzwIfrYifzaQ==)
---
| Patriot,
On Thursday, I went on The View and took on Joy Behar, Whoopi Goldberg, and the rest of the left-wing hosts on a number of issues, and I did not pull any punches. I stood up for the Silent Majority who are routinely mocked by the social elite on The View every day. Check out the segment here:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x2NRKFnnB52d1aP5QtkOWn6lVNadSJeW9W-6z7GfUW3yUrhSZDfeQ-eW3eIG2WnQbwUgPurNT63Yr1ZJuKKJJMiVSDei3Hhj9spLkNkJLJWv5Lu-85I_krnzMXH2ZyI5pOnm9NJWGWv1Ovh1U_pUPwXMz3oh7taqWQJeqT_SR14=&c=2bqyY2wxuwldOYvV0wM8gsnWETjvNZM3r2bizC13B3BsOv9LVMpMCw==&ch=acrH2gPBj38jIY3dxCOdYvvGiRTDLU0Gh891xOHXBJHzwIfrYifzaQ==)
---
| I will not stand by and watch coastal elites demonize middle America and the true hard-working people of our country.
We need to band together and show these far-left TV talking heads that we won't back down from defending our values.
I want to prove to the mainstream media across the country that we can mobilize the "Deplorables" into a grassroots army that can't be stopped. subject: ICYMI: Houston Chronicle: “We see Kulkarni as the strongest possible candidate for Democrats hoping to turn the seat blue”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:

---
Team,

Allen emailed the other day about our latest major endorsement, and if you haven't heard, the _Houston Chronicle_ believes that Sri is the best chance we've got of flipping this seat!

We're closing in on the primary, and it all comes down to these final _11 days_!

Help us reach our online fundraising goal before the end of the month to ensure that we don't face a runoff and can focus all of our attention on beating the GOP in November.

**[Can you make a contribution of any amount, friend?](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?refcode=20200221&amount=25&recurring=1)**

Thank you for your support and for being on our team!

Team Sri

**\---Original Message---**

Team,

If you haven't heard the news, we've got another major endorsement: _The Houston Chronicle_!

The Chronicle knows Sri is the best chance we've got at flipping this seat and bringing progress to Texas' 22nd District, and we need your help to do so.

We're just 13 days from the primary, and to hit our online fundraising goal and ensure that we don't face a runoff, we _have_ to hit our goal. **[Can you make a contribution of any amount, friend?](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?refcode=20200221&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $22](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=20200221)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200221)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200221)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20200221)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/z8PeDxH_GyWPASijhDmZzZHsEzi73d96ldXOzjg69TY=/hQGohSN2LYfeTy0w5fdloljGu80-lgIYWqMCtdcy6VI=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200221)** Here's my favorite part of the whole piece: "But for all his global perspective -- he says he speaks six languages well -- Kulkarni impressed us with his commitment to help people in his district."

It's truly Sri's commitment to this community that will make him an incredible leader in Congress, and I'm proud to be on Team Sri.

All our hard work comes down to what happens on March 3rd -- but early voting has already begun, so if you're ready to flip this seat, get to an early voting location _today_ (and bring your family, friends, and neighbors along, too!)

Thank you for being with us in the fight for progress,

Allen Chen

name: Chris Putnam
subject: 1,367 Things Granger and Pelosi Have in Common
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, While Kay Granger pretends to be a conservative when she visits Texas, **she 's an entirely different person in Washington.** Instead of standing up for our rights and _fighting_ Nancy Pelosi's liberal agenda, **Kay Granger sides _with_ the Democrats time and time again.** **Since 2011, Granger has voted with Nancy Pelosi 1,367 times!** This includes supporting government bailouts, increasing our national debt, and funding Planned Parenthood with our taxpayer dollars. Since I joined the race last fall, I have spent every day on the campaign trail exposing her record. In response, Kay has tried to cover her tracks, claiming to be an ally of President Trump. Here's what I can tell you for certain: **I will absolutely never vote with Nancy Pelosi 's agenda in Congress.** Instead, I'll fight for our shared conservative values and help President Trump drain the Washington D.C. swamp, once and for all. [**With less than two weeks until election day, can I count on you to help me expose Kay Granger and her liberal record?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/HaII6EH0F4tDgEL3OWUyLA/JQ2Od0au1SzfgsCDMhE9cg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/HaII6EH0F4tDgEL3OWUyLA/JQ2Od0au1SzfgsCDMhE9cg) [**Kay Granger and the political establishment are trying their hardest to prevent us from delivering our message across Texas ' 12th district. Will you help us broadcast the truth by chipping in $20 or more today?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/HaII6EH0F4tDgEL3OWUyLA/JQ2Od0au1SzfgsCDMhE9cg) Friend, we are so close to finishing what we've started. * We need a leader who will keep this seat blue so we can continue fighting for health care, rural economic development and Social Security and Medicare.
* The House has passed so many important bills in the past year, and we can't let that progress stop with the 2020 election.
* Rita is a true leader who knows Iowans -- she's lived here her whole life, worked as a teacher, farmer and then as a state senator.
* Rita believes that everyone deserves to be heard, so much so that she takes a lot of time and resources to make sure she listens to everyone.
* Rita is an independent thinker who will always put Iowans' values and ideas first.

**[If any of these are important to you, then you know Rita's race is worth fighting for. Donate any amount today so we can help Rita WIN in November!](https://act.myngp.com/el/RuNDgMBjPne0GHyLPauaUQVH3aMVbCQGAN-xQ3L5eNw=/pWbR__kT3ruQ5rrgHUfTWFWn0-Iht9czdsVGHpsOdrU=?refcode=200221-email)** [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/RuNDgMBjPne0GHyLPauaUQVH3aMVbCQGAN-xQ3L5eNw=/ts-gMBxMtYiqWQ9ZtqUFaNxORQztHtLcdPJf7lZujQI=?refcode=200221-email) \- IA-2 Democrats for Rita | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

name: Tom Cotton
subject: CNN attacks me – fight back by helping General Don Bolduc
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
General Don Bolduc is a conservative running for Senate in New Hampshire and the last thing CNN wants is for him to win.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from the NRSC,visit here. http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Friend,

I’m focused on keeping the American people safe. I’ve said China has lied about the Coronavirus.

Now? CNN is coming after me
http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 That’s right the media is more obsessed with attacking a conservative than asking why China has been lying.

If you’re tired of this, here’s the best thing you can do to fight back:

General Don Bolduc is a conservative running for Senate in New Hampshire and the last thing CNN wants is for him to win.
http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 General Bolduc led soldiers into Afghanistan to take out Taliban terrorists, and he did it on horseback.

Unlike the Democrats and the Media, General Bolduc is willing to stand up to China and he’s got my back.
http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 General Bolduc can win this race, but he needs our help.

I’ve directed my Team to send the maximum contribution to General Bolduc so he can get his message out.

And I’m asking you to help too.

Will you please chip in whatever you can to help General Bolduc win and allow us to serve together to stand up to China and the liberal media? http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

In service,

Tom

DONATE NOW http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for

NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002

The NRSC is the sole national committee dedicated to strengthening our
Republican Senate majority. We believe that emails are a vital way for us to
communicate with supporters like you through breaking news alerts on issues and
events critical to the future of our country and our Republican Senate majority.
This committee is 100% committed to defeating all Democrat Senate candidates
this cycle, but we rely on the generosity of supporters like you. 99% of the
NRSC’s donations come from small donations from our grassroots supporters.

This message reflects our committee’s views and opinions. You are receiving this
email because you signed up as a member of our online grassroots community. If
you would like to make a contribution, please visit our website here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0. While it is more cost-effective for our committee and our Senate campaigns to
receive donations online, we do accept donations through mail. If you would prefer to mail in your donation, you can print off our donation form here http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDE4NDE0MDQS1&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=2&j=MTcwMTc5NjExNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 and send it to our committee.

name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday Feb 22 & Sunday Feb 23
body:
Greetings Friends and Supporters !

We have another "Weekend of Action" planned for this weekend. Lots of doors to hit all over the district. If you can make it out to 1 of our 4 walks we have organized, please let us know! We also will have 2 Sign Crews going all over the district putting up Large and small signs. If you have a good location for us, please let us know by replying to this email.

Saturday February 22nd : 12:30 pm to 4pm.
Walk#1)
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Walk #2)
We will be gathering at Dunkin Donuts in Lake Co. ( 442 Orchard St. Antioch, IL 60002 ) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Sunday February 23rd : 1:00 pm to 4pm.

Walk #3:
We will be gathering at the Crystal Lake Campaign office ( 6500 Northwest Highway suite 8, Crystal Lake, IL / McHenry Co GOP Office ) at 1:00 pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Walk #4:

We will be gathering at Dunkin Donuts in Lake Co. ( 442 Orchard St. Antioch, IL 60002 ) at 1:00pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Let us know if you can make it !

Vote by Mail Information

<https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/>

Early voting has started, get out and vote today!

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS

name: Rep. Katie Porter
subject: What we need to win in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC |
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump campaigned on "draining the swamp" of corruption. Yet, in the three years of the Trump administration, five members of Trump's cabinet have been forced to resign due to corruption. (Not to mention Trump's own abuse of power for political gain that led to his impeachment.)

These aren't anomalies. His policies are also designed to help his megadonors, not the working class or those in poverty:
* His tax bill for billionaires and corporations added nearly $2 trillion to the deficit while doing nothing for workers. In fact, he's trying to make up the money by kicking hundreds of thousands off food stamps and making it more difficult for people with disabilities to access benefits.

* When Congress wouldn't go along with his efforts to repeal the ACA, he turned to supporting a lawsuit aimed at undoing the law with no protections in place for people with pre-existing conditions.

* Trump's 2021 budget wish list includes cuts to Medicare and Medicaid and massive cuts to the Environmental Protection Agency with zero acknowledgment of the climate crisis we're in or the staggering impact it will have on our children.

This is who he's always been. He's going to continue to lie and mislead voters to hold onto power, and if we don't fight back, there's a real chance he could be re-elected.

Progressive Majority is fighting back against Trump and his agenda, working non-stop to protect and expand our majority in the House, and turning out crucial Democratic voters across the country in November. But donations have slowed down this week, so I'm writing to ask for your help.

If you care about stopping Trump, about protecting and expanding the progressive majority in Congress, I'm personally asking for your support today. We can win in November, but not without your help today: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-katieporter**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c4b/5360b1c8/2d4a35e8/b0711ef/1043410686/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-katieporter?refcode=PRO20200221&refcode2=G0DoxlogPzUmS1343iYY")

Thank you for everything you do,
Katie

| Progressive Majority PAC is leading the fight against Trump's dangerous and divisive agenda by helping elect progressive Democrats to Congress and protecting the gains we made in the midterms. This movement is powered by progressives like you. Chip in now [**here**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c4b/5360b1c8/2d4a35e8/b0711ee/1043410686/VEsE/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-majority?refcode=footer") and help make it happen.

Progressive Majority PAC
410 1st St, SE
Suite 310
Washington, DC 20003 |

name: Team Hunt
subject: 11 Days Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

With only 11 days remaining until the March 3rd Primary Election, we need your help to get Wesley elected! What can you do to support Wesley?

1. **Vote**. Early Voting has already started and polls are open from 7:00am to 7:00pm.

2\. **Get the message out to your friends, neighbors and family members**. We're hosting a Super Saturday tomorrow and kicking off block-walks in [3 different locations](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e1350864185a4aafa5451222badb3145&_e=MFjPsrk63joUQeVmfijskx0C-xWABXRk767WpYQkEBwMfV307lGrlGkzt9HZkgBdGOcDqQpgBAjYC70TW20jtvdrcqIk6OQd7Sz5q6y3ujiBpSp5mI-PgKwXa1ogCRqWa3-cdD-Hc06Fuxjgr8B3JD-azwQwwUw42OIFG8Y5yochzlkt8IVL1pzU5Git0JVfpS4Z6Ds2IrUaWLcsM-GPSVZ_GTOKaSG0iRDjS_1x_1-r_r6_s3dWpMcf9qraRq190Rr7pe_58WOtxEh6WhFSbHeI9Hq9LAOOGj4kRbLtosc%3D). Come out and help us connect Wesley's message with voters throughout the 7th District. name: Team Messner
subject: This week's updates from the campaign trail!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/c39db529b52ba0dcc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Donate Now! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/2886354dd99aa846c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/da8ba2474c4d8b66c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Dartmouth Democrats Flunk Free Speech Test **
This past week, Corky Messner condemned Dartmouth College Democrat student activists who forced the cancellation of his Feb. 18th campus visit after threatening to disrupt the event.

“Thanks to the efforts of agitators who disagreed with the planned event topic, we were denied the right to assemble, the right to listen to others’ viewpoints, the right to even express ourselves.
Ironically, freedom of speech is demonized at an institution of higher learning, where expression and exploration of ideas should be exalted, not stamped out.”

Dartmouth College Republicans were forced to cancel Corky’s appearance due to the militant stance of Dartmouth College Democrats and their leftist friends, who charged that the topic was racist and xenophobic. The title of the talk scheduled for Tuesday was “Building a Wall Against Drugs: The Need for Border Security to End the Opioid Crisis.”

After Democrat students’ vows to disrupt the event, Corky’s student hosts decided to postpone the talk over security concerns, but Corky managed to travel to Dartmouth to meet privately with his hosts.

Said Messner: “Who can argue that the flow of illegal substances across our borders is fueling the opioid crisis which has devastated so many New Hampshire communities and families? Can an open, frank discussion of the challenges we face be so disturbing to some at Dartmouth that they warrant intimidation and threats to those who would host that discussion?”
|
---
**In the News**
Related to the Dartmouth debacle, Michael Graham of InsideSources ran an item describing the Messner event cancellation, and quoted Corky on how student activists succeeded through threats and intimidation to shut down free speech.

Here’s Michael’s piece: [https://www.insidesources.com/dartmouth-college-republicans-cancel-opioids-and-border-wall-event-after-threats-from-progressives/](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/e0b9612d8212efcfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Quick Pic**
Corky checked out the annual Sled Dog Derby in Laconia recently, enjoying New Hampshire’s great outdoors and visiting with participants and visitors. A beautiful winter’s day in the Granite State!
|
---
**Campaign Notes: Doucette Named Co-Chair**
Longtime Republican Party activist and New Hampshire State Rep. Fred Doucette of Salem, who recently dropped his support of rival candidate Don Bolduc, has been named campaign co-chair.

He will share the Messner campaign chairmanship with Wayne MacDonald, former New Hampshire GOP party chairman.

Watch Fred’s endorsement here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PS8K1oH3FXY](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/5a6da5111451865dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

“After watching this campaign over the last several months, it has become clear to me that Corky Messner is the only person in this race who can beat Senator Shaheen,” says Doucette. “He is not a career politician like the Senator and he certainly does not represent the socialist agenda of Bernie Sanders. Unlike some in this race, he has been a staunch supporter of President Trump and is a consistent conservative we can trust. The combination of Corky's resources and commitment to working hard for every vote will lead us to victories in both the September primary and the November election."

Rep. Doucette is a Navy veteran and a life member of the New Hampshire Veterans Association. He retired from the Salem Fire Department in 2012 after 25 years of service as a firefighter and paramedic, and is a third-degree Knights of Columbus member. The three-term state representative from Rockingham District 8 – Salem served as Assistant Majority Leader in 2017, and is currently Assistant GOP Floor Leader.

He co-chaired President Trump’s New Hampshire presidential campaign in 2016 and co-chairs his 2020 campaign.
|
---
**Upcoming Events**
Speaking Event: Winnipesaukee Republicans Meeting
Monday, February 24, 2020
5:00 - 7:00 p.m.
[Jo Green's Garden Cafe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/4d730a0f92b7b055c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
33 Dockside St.
Wolfeboro, NH

TOWN HALL
Thursday, March 19, 2020
6:30 - 8 p.m.
[Tuscan Kitchen](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/2348cbfd3e87bb59c3d6b838967d376c/33153) - Toscana Room
67 Main Street
Salem, NH
RSVP: [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/salem-town-hall-tickets-95265239897](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/3c155c23e0eed8a2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Messner Minute – Dartmouth and Free Speech**
Corky waded through the snow to capture his thoughts about the cancellation of his Dartmouth College appearance, and how leftist students’ intimidation and threats served to shut down his First Amendment rights.
Watch the video here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AMlE2jx-EQw&feature;=youtu.be](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1662ed4594fe37c5/d8e44e6b3049ced4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: My friend, Rep. John Lewis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/9IWcA3JvIaNpn6OLVOLImwETgeaBlS9wx4qZ8MoF6kA=)
---
| Friends, Rep. John Lewis has dedicated his life to public service -- from organizing the 1963 March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom and leading the Freedom Rides, to speaking out against the Iraq War and coordinating a Congressional sit-in for gun safety. **I am proud to call John Lewis a friend, and to stand with him in the fight for justice, equality, and dignity for all people.** [**So today, John Lewis ' 80th birthday, I am honoring his legacy by pledging to vote this November. Will you stand with me and Rep. John Lewis by taking the pledge to vote?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/kJXyNPlQP76GKyXXpS4zvnf9-RfFuNCqrvH8DsLdadg=?source=Al-Green&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Lewis-Pledge-Al-Green-AB) | **[TAKE THE PLEDGE ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/kJXyNPlQP76GKyXXpS4zvnf9-RfFuNCqrvH8DsLdadg=?source=Al-Green&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Lewis-Pledge-Al-Green-AB)**
---
In 1965, John Lewis led the march that came to be known as Bloody Sunday. He suffered severe violence as he and his colleagues rode an integrated bus from Washington, DC to New Orleans. He chaired the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee and organized countless sit-ins, boycotts, and protests to end segregation in all forms -- including segregation in voting rights.
The leaders of the Civil Rights movement gave their lives to ensure all Americans could vote. Yet the right to vote continues to be restrained by racist voter ID laws, voter roll purges, polling place closures, and more.
[**So, will you honor the sacrifices made by John Lewis and his colleagues in the Civil Rights movement by pledging to exercise your right to vote this November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/kJXyNPlQP76GKyXXpS4zvnf9-RfFuNCqrvH8DsLdadg=?source=Al-Green&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Lewis-Pledge-Al-Green-AB)
**[SIGN HERE ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/kJXyNPlQP76GKyXXpS4zvnf9-RfFuNCqrvH8DsLdadg=?source=Al-Green&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Lewis-Pledge-Al-Green-AB)**
---
The work isn't done, but I will always stand with you in the fight for equality.
In solidarity,
Congressman Al Green

* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/4qnCrxSLjsg2_tHnppwSSmzUgy_NnmI45i0J5sOxITQ=) here.
---
| **[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/qV2veUzzkWUY4Nv9qua7fpi3svWA-d-AutdhjQhIXb4=/gsBahyVt0caD8OLMm5rHlQW_qIrA1Mu3PXACyJMfQ2s=?refcode=E1373-20200221-JohnLewisJA-footer&amount=25)**
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---

P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States
