name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Where we stand
body:
Good afternoon Peter,
As of right now, only 7,300 people have voted in the Democratic primary. In recent years, nearly 54,000 people have voted in the primary. In order to win, we need to receive the majority of those votes.

I want to send out mailers to voters who don't usually vote in the primary, or who don't realize what's at stake. (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927)

I have long campaigned on the threat of flooding, and the damage that will occur if we don't take action. Congress has thus far failed to take significant action to mitigate future flooding, and provide for those who've suffered from past flooding.

In fact, two days ago, a federal judge ruled that the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers cannot be held liable (https://www.texastribune.org/2020/02/19/federal-judge-dismisses-against-army-corps-post-harvey-flooding/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927) for damage caused by Hurricane Harvey because it was an act of God, and therefore not the responsibility of the U.S. government.
http://marcfloresforcongress.com/issues?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927

http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927

WHERE WE STAND
To share this vital message, and remind voters about what I plan to do when in office, I need your help. Many voters -- especially those who are marginalized or impoverished -- feel that their vote doesn't matter, and won't vote for this reason. If you donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927) today, we can reach these voters via mailer, and show them that someone is fighting on their behalf.
Donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927)
VOTER OUTREACH
If you have the time, we still need lots of help with voter outreach. Until we have the funding to send out the mailers above, we will be out knocking on doors telling voters what I stand for, and why I want to represent them. Our next event is a block walk tomorrow, Saturday, February 22nd, at a 9 AM. Sign up (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/175649/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=77e8b4ddd5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_21_01_49&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-77e8b4ddd5-32267927) to block walk with us!

clean_body: Good afternoon Peter, As of right now, only 7,300 people have voted in the Democratic primary. In recent years, nearly 54,000 people have voted in the primary. In order to win, we need to receive the majority of those votes. I want to send out mailers to voters who don't usually vote in the primary, or who don't realize what's at stake. () I have long campaigned on the threat of flooding, and the damage that will occur if we don't take action. Congress has thus far failed to take significant action to mitigate future flooding, and provide for those who've suffered from past flooding. In fact, two days ago, a federal judge ruled that the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers cannot be held liable () for damage caused by Hurricane Harvey because it was an act of God, and therefore not the responsibility of the U.S. government. WHERE WE STAND To share this vital message, and remind voters about what I plan to do when in office, I need your help. Many voters -- especially those who are marginalized or impoverished -- feel that their vote doesn't matter, and won't vote for this reason. If you donate $20 () today, we can reach these voters via mailer, and show them that someone is fighting on their behalf. Donate $20 () VOTER OUTREACH If you have the time, we still need lots of help with voter outreach. Until we have the funding to send out the mailers above, we will be out knocking on doors telling voters what I stand for, and why I want to represent them. Our next event is a block walk tomorrow, Saturday, February 22nd, at a 9 AM. Sign up () to block walk with us! Volunteer Now! () Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () Thanks, and see you out there, Marc ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Kathy Manning for Congress

body:
This is GREAT news ->
|
---

| | **_The New York Times_ : "Courts Make Photo ID Less Likely in North Carolina 2020 Voting"** Friend : A court unanimously ruled against a discriminatory voter ID law, making it much less likely for it to be implemented before the 2020 election. **That 's great news for our race, but even more important: It's great news for our democracy!** All over the country, states are using restrictive voter ID laws and similar voter suppression tactics to discriminate against minority voters and quell the voices of hard-working Americans. The decision out of North Carolina is a victory for voting rights! Now, more voters can make their voices heard in this critical battleground state. [_**This is an important step forward, but it 's just one of the hurdles we must overcome to get voters to the polls. The end-of-month deadline is less than a week away, and the primary is just a few days after that. Will you rush in a contribution to our campaign to make sure we can reach as many voters as possible?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d35b/3d199a51/2f1da8b9/7364f416/2566493261/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDIyMSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJhIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200221?refcode=kme200221_a_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d35b/3d199a51/2f1da8b9/7364f416/2566493261/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDIyMSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJhIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200221?refcode=kme200221_a_other&refcode2=17426")

Susan Collins has taken huge campaign checks from Big Pharma, insurance companies, and Wall Street.

She's taking that money and running NON-STOP TV ads that call her "bipartisan" and an "independent."

**Sorry, Susan -- the facts tell a different story! **

• She voted for the Trump tax cuts for the rich.
• She put anti-choice extremists Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch on the Supreme Court FOR LIFE.
• She participated in the sham impeachment cover-up by voting to acquit Trump without hearing from witnesses.

**This race will be won or lost on our ability to get the TRUTH to every Maine voter about Susan Collins ' record. **

**[That's what the Senate Battleground Fund is all about -- can you chip in $5 and help hit our 2,000-donation goal by midnight? ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d057c/72412298/4ed3adce/61047959/2589731300/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIyMV9Db2xsaW5zUG9sbF9VMl9YMiJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200221_CollinsPoll_U2_X2&amount=5&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Thatrsquos+what+the+Senate+Battleground+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200221_CollinsPoll_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200221_CollinsPoll_U2_X2")**

He went on to detail the Justice Department's overruling of sentencing guidelines for Trump buddy Roger Stone, just hours after the president tweeted that the sentencing was "unfair," a disgusting abuse of power that has led FOUR Justice Department lawyers working on the case to withdraw.
Oliver concluded the segment with: "Susan Collins may have actually been right about one thing: Trump did learn a lesson from his impeachment trial; specifically, I can get away with anything because nobody will hold me accountable."
**The path to the Senate majority runs through Maine -- and to win this race, we need to EXPOSE Susan Collins ' true record for every voter to see. **

| Peter,
We've just about completed our first week of Early Voting, and the pace of the campaign is still picking up! We've had several candidate forums recently, and I've been to multiple events in the district every day. Here's just a taste of what has been going on.
---
| IN THE DISTRICT
---
| We have Meet & Greet events coming up on Tuesday and Wednesday evenings. Please email [andrew@gcforcongress.com](mailto:andrew@gcforcongress.com) for more details and to RSVP. Hope to see you there!

| BIG NEWS!
---
| This week, the NRCC labeled us a "contender" race. This is actually a really big deal. What it means is that we have been named THE campaign in this race that has the best chance of beating Colin Allred in November. Please [click here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aU4vYbTQFsdRt8pivumIulAGE-2RdVsb-7GkHp1u1Z_fkDW_08rs8WFpHUxxwb_78UxBTcGGYntuSK8GNaESPUFem1prpwMNOe290o2dSTrvoHycK3hsn-UgcwYYGJXwnF-Qsnzd0Ve9zif10XQ8hg4sPmNjDDrNEjko1JoxRvoVaL1sq8cB0g==&c=-zgTE-PKPu7nf8a19_TJN18Ylm2UWZotnMtUOQVxFxXD-p1UKlWFCQ==&ch=HS_GmuxKdDxnDAxqqCMlc_kMBM9IOlUw3WrKGSo5rufCAi90CuQ5yg==) to contribute and help us ensure victory.

---
| Early Voting is going on all weekend and through February 28th. You can [click here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aU4vYbTQFsdRt8pivumIulAGE-2RdVsb-7GkHp1u1Z_fkDW_08rs8U3GBLfvh6-0uSKHFa-b-qdla0-NER-NOrW29aseyl7yvmAWqs1X0FM0cax2d9aD6jBxbC7h1H2ZcMvurKWm-tBHLjHDC5iXpVJIk2U_T08t&c=-zgTE-PKPu7nf8a19_TJN18Ylm2UWZotnMtUOQVxFxXD-p1UKlWFCQ==&ch=HS_GmuxKdDxnDAxqqCMlc_kMBM9IOlUw3WrKGSo5rufCAi90CuQ5yg==) to find Early Voting locations and times.

| If you haven't voted yet, I hope you'll take advantage of Early Voting to avoid Election Day lines and crowds. If you've already voted, I greatly appreciate your support. I know that with our amazing team of supporters, we will win this race!

Our Congressman’s biggest donor last cycle was from the fossil fuel industry. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zg/DCHUrRq4RdicP3DXRX3ISg/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718b60jG29TXDSJ7HS0geeBUNM-2FAOTFd3OJz8Q1FdTMSZNDFo-2BQHt5s11XiDn1EHfza3hjt2NWkLbV0S4sKADO4C0SExV-2BotC4pLgcAa5pt-2F6lCpbzAsKJj3toVuNX25NyI2IwVMI7Mw2RwUPngk1gGhA-3D-3D/zZyL)

Hi Friend, Yesterday, I had the opportunity to talk with voters about the climate crisis at the first candidates forum of this election season, sponsored by the Eugene/Springfield branch of the NAACP, Beyond Toxics and 350 Eugene. Unsurprisingly, Rep. DeFazio didn't show up. Lets be clear, Congressman DeFazio is Dangerous for the future of our climate. This is a climate emergency that has been 33 years in the making. Our Congressman's biggest donor last cycle was from the fossil fuel industry. He has been taking their money for his last 18 reelection campaigns, and in order to defeat me, has taken campaign contributions from companies like timber giant Weyerhaeuser, weapons maker Raytheon, tax dodger Amazon, oil train runner CSX, and S & B Engineering, who makes their money fracking gas. Unlike the Congressman, from day one of this campaign I have committed to taking no money from corporate lobbyists, and fighting Pembina's pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG export terminal because it is the among the most defining environmental and climate justice battles in our country today. Oregonians want a leader who answers to them, not big money corporate donors, and that's why we will win this election on May 19. **If you are ready for new leadership, chip in to my campaign today:**

I have a vision for the future of our district - that we can lead the nation in a just transition to wind, wave, and solar energy. That the rest of the country will be paying us to keep our forests standing and to bring regenerative farming and ranching to scale across Oregon. The only thing standing in our way is a political system that is corrupted by corporate money, and a Democratic establishment that doesn't want that to change. But it must change, and we are the ones who are changing it together with this historic grassroots campaign." **[Donate $10, $20, $100 or whatever you can afford to help power this campaign for Congress in 2020. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EQE/ni0YAA/t.2zg/DCHUrRq4RdicP3DXRX3ISg/h7/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0vrJahIyA77Rwf2sM6fURzsfbdn4KHYGGguxqA-2Bw4NvQhspUtwXC2QxFY2Sr-2F40Ug3-2BnBC8anFBI8B3raioMOmIBBPq8QFOXZWbQnnrvEgXZpEBSXklp00Ij014-2FdspCVxUaFmzrpaGpsYfezCCZPn7EILC5cTMqT4cgyiyRUnl9CuWFpI3L7fL8LvOUnzrPB-2BjyVheCKzphJPCPWyB-2Brhy9y3vjK9mtrlu55CpgAiSM-3D/zrF9)** Onward, Doyle Canning

name: BORDER UPDATE Team Shedd
subject: This is urgent, Friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, The Democrats in Congress are out of control. One-fifth of the House Democratic caucus has co-sponsored a new bill called **The New Way Forward**. This bill transforms our immigration system to ensure that criminals are allowed to move to the United States and become citizens. The New Way Forward bill would:
* Make it nearly impossible for ICE to detain immigrants

* Make it illegal to automatically deport criminals regardless of crime

* Allow people who commit serious felonies in other countries to still come to the United States

* Decriminalize illegal entry into the US.

[ **This bill abolishes our borders and allows anyone to freely enter our country without any consequences.** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7756c73f2a8d420f9e309c5546895305&_e=QYMmCdsfpi7KRl1VKaa1vA5l6qiSdlWKAgBbESbwiFnn1UEOUMGSUZYPGjm_lFXh6Vx4MQXZzNduKdapLWk-z9FxuSj_IIaKEtDMWd6anvb9BS6T1s2HtKi26NbCU_Ya_pFAfz0SDSVAMs2jemJDsIJ1ZW7AHbguoMHkZ6ZwoBlUz8hwxZ7Kix4BO8d_B2D3IrqM-76GzM0WTAdpBf6SpZGGpB9lCFCni88Ng7VU5edm-lVTxQ3d3neGEfDojwC685YgIMRQ8wrq3b-jYvT6DQCT2ir_OTsLhA5PQRHlwn0UkJM139b-k_Fki3mbykC_vfCsO0Y-nHiXXGx5XAZCqrvmTfVRErESbGqppnUoeZTraZjP_NllZuOU3R_i8UV0I0vwzaIeP5-6I6yqL16HUf4sy-2Cz37uCpoBoLvJQB8%3D) If enacted The New Way Forward bill would be disastrous. Friends, **Tiffany grew up,****raised her family, and owns a farm near the southern border so she ****understands the real issues that affect our border. **She supports building the wall and increasing our border security measures. If enacted The New Way Forward bill would be disastrous. It prioritizes criminals ahead of the safety and security of American families. Stand with Tiffany against this new threat to our national security by signing our [Stop The New Way Forward Petition.](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7756c73f2a8d420f9e309c5546895305&_e=QYMmCdsfpi7KRl1VKaa1vA5l6qiSdlWKAgBbESbwiFnn1UEOUMGSUZYPGjm_lFXh6Vx4MQXZzNduKdapLWk-z9FxuSj_IIaKEtDMWd6anvb9BS6T1s2HtKi26NbCU_Ya_pFAfz0SDSVAMs2jemJDsIJ1ZW7AHbguoMHkZ6ZwoBlUz8hwxZ7Kix4BO8d_B2D3IrqM-76GzM0WTAdpBf6SpTJtC5w1j6xftrwxjWjfnakr6Ur5Qpj0SvkgNwuVNbXsir9liaxngsuwz2j-OYXRn1N4a1-yuDAsg-N9vju-r0npIxeAeYizfqwKbflaSHJMghIHsgxDc_hUdgYm0tpCjtVaYtgF8fY_H5LW5jcvE6KoGa5RiJ6PIVXFg1C0HPmgHTEwRWjb1FVJC61shD6KekLInGD6ZSuhm5cOPwQGOdw%3D) **[Add your name to stand with Tiffany and say no to opening our borders>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7756c73f2a8d420f9e309c5546895305&_e=QYMmCdsfpi7KRl1VKaa1vA5l6qiSdlWKAgBbESbwiFnn1UEOUMGSUZYPGjm_lFXh6Vx4MQXZzNduKdapLWk-z9FxuSj_IIaKEtDMWd6anvb9BS6T1s2HtKi26NbCU_Ya_pFAfz0SDSVAMs2jemJDsIJ1ZW7AHbguoMHkZ6ZwoBlUz8hwxZ7Kix4BO8d_B2D3IrqM-76GzM0WTAdpBf6SpTVz3n-WiGuZxVRgb7X8Cztz8lojzjdQXu4wcEQRBH3-nmV6uqrx28yRVB7yru_JkAb1vCZaJbLOyn9MygqIVj02AnDQGq92R8A7XYJZdViWEw9aqkND2lSOugaKNqTfqtJH2jclWFRcF4m0APrOGAjKe8mzLZiOY7QLawige1D-NosQOgG0lL6NYbVOZ2elxRbBXS_Pa8_QfbYPnepS8cE%3D)** One thing is clear – this bill makes it easier to arrest you, as an American citizen than arresting an illegal immigrant. clean_body: Friends, The Democrats in Congress are out of control. One-fifth of the House Democratic caucus has co-sponsored a new bill called The New Way Forward. This bill transforms our immigration system to ensure that criminals are allowed to move to the United States and become citizens. The New Way Forward bill would: Make it nearly impossible for ICE to detain immigrants Make it illegal to automatically deport criminals regardless of crime Allow people who commit serious felonies in other countries to still come to the United States Decriminalize illegal entry into the US. If enacted The New Way Forward bill would be disastrous. Friends, Tiffany grew up,raised her family, and owns a farm near the southern border so she understands the real issues that affect our border. She supports building the wall and increasing our border security measures. If enacted The New Way Forward bill would be disastrous. It prioritizes criminals ahead of the safety and security of American families. Stand with Tiffany against this new threat to our national security by signing our One thing is clear – this bill makes it easier to arrest you, as an American citizen than arresting an illegal immigrant. It’s alarming how so many Democrats want to reshape our immigration system and put our communities at risk. We need Tiffany in Congress to stand against this and to fight with President Trump. Thank you, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

body:

| | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903ed/55b66746/22a5b8f3/80fd2bc/3194685325/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/bring-troops-back/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-bring-troops-back-email") Our war in Afghanistan is the longest armed conflict in American history. And we've been lied to about it for two decades, as the release of the Afghanistan papers in December made clear. We have been lied to about the cost. The effectiveness. The mission itself. And most damning - we have been lied to about the burden that has been placed on our service members and their families. **Enough. We need to bring our troops back home. Sign now if you agree:** [Sign Your Name](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903ed/55b66746/22a5b8f3/80fd2bc/3194685325/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/bring-troops-back/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-bring-troops-back-email") No more endless war. No more putting our service members in harm's way for wars we didn't want. Bring them home. \- Team Kennedy |

clean_body: | "" | | "" Our war in Afghanistan is the longest armed conflict in American history. And we've been lied to about it for two decades, as the release of the Afghanistan papers in December made clear. We have been lied to about the cost. The effectiveness. The mission itself. And most damning - we have been lied to about the burden that has been placed on our service members and their families. Enough. We need to bring our troops back home. Sign now if you agree: "" No more endless war. No more putting our service members in harm's way for wars we didn't want. body:

| |

# _**So Are We!**_

My fellow Iowans, We are looking for individuals and businesses willing to host meet and greets for the Bobby For Iowa campaign in the month of March. We are looking forward to hearing about the issues that are most important to you and your family.

Our main opponent in this race has already lost 3 times in the 2nd District, we can't afford to have her lose again.

If you agree, then we need your help! Please sign up to host a meet and greet with Bobby. Please reach out at [Info@bobbyforiowa.com](mailto:Info@bobbyforiowa.com "mailto:Info@bobbyforiowa.com").

Thank you, and we will talk to you soon.

\- Bobby Schilling

body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f13c/6cd27893/53fb9906/15868028/2825454702/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")

| | One week ago, on Valentine's Day, I asked for your help to raise money for four challengers fighting to flip the Senate -- races we need to win if we want to protect and expand health care, tackle the climate crisis, defend voting rights, and protect the equality and autonomy of all Americans. Within minutes, hundreds of small donations poured in, raising $5,000 from our community. Then I crossed my fingers and asked if you could double it. Well, you didn't double it. _You quadrupled it._ **This team raised $20,034 to [help build a massive blue wave that takes back the Senate! ](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f13c/6cd27893/53fb9906/15868029/2825454702/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?refcode=2020-02-21-valentinethx&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** I am so grateful to be in this fight with you. subject: How MJ can beat the odds

body:
But she needs your help to do it!

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890547/7f51f7bc/4dd2af85/4ef1a36c/1657771815/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, we'll level with you: Unseating an entrenched incumbent senator like Senator Cornyn is going to be tough, but MJ has faced tougher odds in her life. Sen. Cornyn just released his last finance report before the primary: He's raised **$1.2 million since January and is heading into the primary with over $12 million in the bank.**

We're setting up phone and text banks, hosting meet and greets, placing ad buys, and reaching out to undecided Texans. **[Can you donate $10 to help fund our ads and build the infrastructure we need?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890547/7f51f7bc/4dd2af85/4ef1a363/1657771815/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200221.2nd__954__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ doesn't give a damn about what the corporate PACs with their deep pockets want Washington to care about on any given day. We elect senators to represent us, not special interests, and that's why MJ believes it's time to retire Senator John Cornyn. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Circling back after Trump's rally last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
This isn't the news I wanted to share, my friend, but we fell short of our $250,000 emergency fundraising goal before Trump's rally for our opponent last night. **So, I 'm personally emailing you now with an urgent, last minute request to help us close the gap.** Our campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from people just like you -- and we have a lot of work to do to keep up with the deep corporate PAC pockets Trump and Gardner have in their corner. All we have to do today is raise $26,062 to close the gap and we'll be right back on track to have the resources we need to win. **Will you make a $10 or more donation to my grassroots Senate campaign before midnight? Any amount will go a long way to get us back on track:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200221?refcode=em-200221-short-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

body:
President Trump Delivers Commencement Address at ‘Hope for Prisoners’ Graduation | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28c159d0b5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**President Trump Delivers Commencement Address at ‘Hope for Prisoners’ Graduation**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=067ffa2ecc&e=3ee4985eea)
-KLAS
“Graduates of the ‘Hope for Prisoners’ program received a certificate and handshake from President Donald J. Trump on Thursday,” KLAS Las Vegas reports. “We are very honored the President of the United States is recognizing the hard-work of formerly incarcerated men and women here in the state of Nevada who are making their transition back into our community,” Hope for Prisoners CEO Jon Ponder said.

**🎬****President Trump:** [“When we say ‘Hire American,’ we mean ALL Americans!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7555dd317e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Takes a Stand for the Mentally Ill**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff6f0b754b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
America’s long-broken mental health system is “turning business districts into homeless camps [and] causing chaos for families of mentally ill adults,” mental health expert D.J. Jaffe writes. President Trump is trying to close a crucial loophole—“the most important thing federal government could do to improve care for the seriously mentally ill.”
---
|
---
| [**President Trump’s Approval Rating Among Small Business Owners Hits All-Time High**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12be5096d0&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
A record-high “sixty-four percent of small business owners approve of the way Donald Trump is handling his job as president,” Riley de Leon reports. “This is a high watermark for President Trump’s job approval, both among small business owners in our survey and among the general public,” SurveyMonkey senior research scientist Laura Wronski said.

**MORE** : [The ‘Trump Bump’ is real](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2edf424a9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**NASA Astronauts Will Return to Space from US Soil 'Before Summer': Pence**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d0178bd6b&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“NASA astronauts will soon launch into space from U.S. soil for the first time in almost 10 years, vowed Vice President Mike Pence,” James Rogers reports. “Before we even get to the summer, with the strong support of all of you, the United States will return American astronauts to space on American rockets from American soil,” the Vice President said.

🚀 **Vice President Pence:** [“We’re going back!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45b9e73d3b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Donald Trump’s Fiscally Conservative Budgets**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=647ad5714a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The_ _Daily Caller_
“One of the most common misconceptions I hear about Donald Trump is that he is not a fiscal conservative,” former Sen. Jim DeMint writes. “Yet, every year, when the president has presented his budget proposals to Congress, they have contained more spending cuts than any president in history. They sought to achieve balance within 10-15 years.”
---

# Democrats are embracing socialism
Join us in running to the fight...
It has been a crazy month of February. No surprise here, but the Democrats are moving even farther to the left. _**They are trying to nominate a lifelong socialist!**_

But here's the good news... The momentum is building for this very important election season. Republicans, Independents, and even some Democrats across the country are moving toward President Trump as these crazy debates escalate. They know that _**America stands for freedom, not Sanders Socialism!**_

We are stronger as a nation when we have conservative leadership in all levels of government, which is why Jake supports Donald J. Trump and why he is running for U.S. Congress. Trump needs conservative fighters in Washington, and we are ready to take back the House and join him in the fight. [Will you pitch in to send a conservative to Congress to stand with President Trump? Anything helps. $100, $25, or even $10](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=59199129b9&e=1050d051da)

---
| February is a short month, and we are determined to stay on target with our goals for 2020.

We are only _**$10,873**_ short of our goal for February. Would you be willing to chip in to get us there? name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Another week, another endorsement
body:
Hoosiers appreciate results. It's why coalitions of Hoosiers from across the state are coming together to pledge their support for Governor Eric... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/another-week-another-endorsement?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Another Week, Another Endorsement_** Hoosiers appreciate results. It's why coalitions of Hoosiers from across the state are coming together to pledge their support for **Governor Eric Holcomb** , a leader who listens carefully and keeps his promises.

First, he earned the endorsement of those Hoosiers who stand on the thin blue line to keep us all safe -- the more than 2,000 active and retired state troopers who are members of the Indiana State Police Alliance.

Next, the Indiana Chamber of Commerce -- Indiana's largest, broad-based business advocacy group -- endorsed **Governor Holcomb**.

Then last week, he received the endorsement of a group that's _literally_ building Indiana, the 2,700 member companies (which employ 350,000 Hoosiers!) of the Indiana Builders Association.

And then this week, I'm so excited to share that **Governor Holcomb** earned the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) and its 12,000 small and independent business members throughout the state!

It does feel like another week, another endorsement ([check them all out here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07cbc1e6c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)). But really, these endorsements represent the work **Governor Holcomb** has taken on since Day One as governor, and the work he'll continue with another four years.

It takes a full team to win an election, and **Governor Holcomb** is thankful to have the support of so many Hoosiers, including you.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:_Governor Holcomb_** _joins National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) State Director Barbara Quandt and President Ty Spatta as the organization and its 12,000 members endorse Governor Holcomb for reelection!_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Honoring Hoosiers Making a Difference_** Earlier this week, **Governor Holcomb** attended events that honored Hoosiers who are making a difference across Indiana! **Governor Holcomb** attended the Lugar Series Annual Luncheon, spoke to the NFIB (and earned their endorsement!) and attended his first Lincoln Day Dinner of 2020!
* **Governor Holcomb** was excited to attend the 30th Annual Lugar Series Luncheon. At the event, **Governor Holcomb** was honored to award Sagamores of the Wabash, Indiana’s highest civilian honor, to Teresa Lubbers and Judy Singleton. These women helped found the organization.
* **Governor Holcomb** has always fought for and supported Hoosier small businesses, which is why he joined them for their Small Business Day to give a few remarks and accept their endorsement.
* **Governor Holcomb** also attended his first Lincoln Day Dinner of 2020 in Marion County’s Perry Township! Our grassroots Republican teams are the difference-makers leading the way to historic election victories. Their hard work allows your Indiana Republican Party to continue fighting for all Hoosiers.

It takes a strong statewide team of Hoosiers to keep Indiana on the winning track! That’s why **Governor Holcomb** is proud to honor those Hoosiers who are making a difference and are helping him continue Putting People First!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Addresses the Lugar Series**_ This year, the Lugar Series celebrated its 30th year of getting women involved in government and politics!

Earlier this week,** Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer **addressed the Lugar Series Annual Luncheon. At the luncheon, he discussed the success of the organization in helping women build leadership skills and develop a network to support their runs for office and leadership in government. The Indiana Republican Party is committed to continuing to grow the diversity within our party’s ranks, and the Lugar Series remains a key partner in making that goal a reality.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_It Might be February, But..._**
Your Indiana Republican team is already out knocking on doors and talking to voters in February! The early work we put in now will be the difference-maker in the fall for **President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb** , and our entire Republican team.

Want to help earn Republican victories in your community? Email us at [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop), and we’ll help get you set up!
---
|
---

| _**South Bend Residents Warn America About Pete Buttigieg**_
In case you missed it, the [New York Post this week](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b87b461572&e=1acd9bb3d6) went to South Bend to talk to a few people about Pete Buttigieg’s real record in the city. Here’s the short version: It wasn’t good.

They also spoke to I**ndiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** about his record and here’s a preview -- “I know I would much rather have 10 fewer homicides than a light display.”
[Check out the full story here!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7cd5c2be1a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| **_Join Us at the 2020 Republican State Convention!_** The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated [our website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c7fb84335&e=1acd9bb3d6) with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes:
* Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8053534084&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! More info is available [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61ece53a2b&e=1acd9bb3d6).

clean_body: Hoosiers appreciate results. It's why coalitions of Hoosiers from across the state are coming together to pledge their support for Governor Eric... | | | | | | | Another Week, Another Endorsement Hoosiers appreciate results. It's why coalitions of Hoosiers from across the state are coming together to pledge their support for Governor Eric Holcomb , a leader who listens carefully and keeps his promises. First, he earned the endorsement of those Hoosiers who stand on the thin blue line to keep us all safe -- the more than 2,000 active and retired state troopers who are members of the Indiana State Police Alliance. Next, the Indiana Chamber of Commerce -- Indiana's largest, broad-based business advocacy group -- endorsed Governor Holcomb. Then last week, he received the endorsement of a group that's literally building Indiana, the 2,700 member companies (which employ 350,000 Hoosiers!) of the Indiana Builders Association. And then this week, I'm so excited to share that Governor Holcomb earned the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) and its 12,000 small and independent business members throughout the state! It does feel like another week, another endorsement (). But really, these endorsements represent the work Governor Holcomb has taken on since Day One as governor, and the work he'll continue with another four years. It takes a full team to win an election, and Governor Holcomb is thankful to have the support of so many Hoosiers, including you. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Governor Holcomb joins National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) State Director Barbara Quandt and President Ty Spatta as the organization and its 12,000 members endorse Governor Holcomb for reelection! | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | | Honoring Hoosiers Making a Difference Earlier this week, Governor Holcomb attended events that honored Hoosiers who are making a difference across Indiana! Governor Holcomb attended the Lugar Series Annual Luncheon, spoke to the NFIB (and earned their endorsement!) and attended his first Lincoln Day Dinner of 2020! Governor Holcomb was excited to attend the 30th Annual Lugar Series Luncheon. At the event, Governor Holcomb was honored to award Sagamores of the Wabash, Indiana’s highest civilian honor, to Teresa Lubbers and Judy Singleton. These women helped found the organization. Governor Holcomb has always fought for and supported Hoosier small businesses, which is why he joined them for their Small Business Day to give a few remarks and accept their endorsement. Governor Holcomb also attended his first Lincoln Day Dinner of 2020 in Marion County’s Perry Township! Our grassroots Republican teams are the difference-makers leading the way to historic election victories. Their hard work allows your Indiana Republican Party to continue fighting for all Hoosiers. It takes a strong statewide team of Hoosiers to keep Indiana on the winning track! That’s why Governor Holcomb is proud to honor those Hoosiers who are making a difference and are helping him continue Putting People First! | | | Chairman Hupfer Addresses the Lugar Series This year, the Lugar Series celebrated its 30th year of getting women involved in government and politics! Earlier this week, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer addressed the Lugar Series Annual Luncheon. At the luncheon, he discussed the success of the organization in helping women build leadership skills and develop a network to support their runs for office and leadership in government. The Indiana Republican Party is committed to continuing to grow the diversity within our party’s ranks, and the Lugar Series remains a key partner in making that goal a reality. | | | It Might be February, But... Your Indiana Republican team is already out knocking on doors and talking to voters in February! The early work we put in now will be the difference-maker in the fall for President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb , and our entire Republican team. Want to help earn Republican victories in your community? Email us at mailto:info@indiana.gop, and we’ll help get you set up! | | | South Bend Residents Warn America About Pete Buttigieg In case you missed it, the went to South Bend to talk to a few people about Pete Buttigieg’s real record in the city. Here’s the short version: It wasn’t good. They also spoke to Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer about his record and here’s a preview -- “I know I would much rather have 10 fewer homicides than a light display.” | | | Happy Birthday, First Lady Janet Holcomb! Last Sunday,First Lady Janet Holcomb celebrated her birthday! We’re so thankful for her work alongside Governor Eric Holcomb serving Hoosiers, and hope she had a great day! | | | Join Us at the 2020 Republican State Convention! The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes: Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees . Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! | [I'LL CHIP IN MORE! ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7911/27c6da69/2b39dd0c/12f0c8d/2901465285/VEsB/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate")

We have such a strong team working their hearts out to elect Sara to Congress because they believe in her vision for our community and country. We're knocking on doors, making calls and getting our message out every way we can. We're relying on you to make sure we have the resources we need to win the race. [_**Please contribute to our Weekend of Action Goal before the deadline.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7911/27c6da69/2b39dd0c/12f0c89/2901465285/VEsO/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200221-1-EM&amount=1")

Amy

name: Gary
subject: checking in with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
he outraised us again

---
| |
---
| | I've won tough elections before, friend - and I intend to do it again in 2020. But in a race as close as this one, every dollar counts.

[**Until midnight, all donations will be doubled. Can you help us meet our end-of-week fundraising goal by chipping in $3?**](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk290-fr-in-nd-v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
---
Friend: I've got nowhere else to turn. My right-wing opponent announced he outraised us again. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling millions into Michigan to prop up my opponent and defeat me - **and if they're successful, Democrats will have zero chance of taking back the Senate.**
So I'm reaching out for your help - but before I ask, I'd like to explain why the stakes of our race are so incredibly high.
If we lose, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm ready to fight tooth and nail to win again. But polling shows me tied with my opponent, and right now, the DeVos family and dark money GOP groups are spending more to defeat me than any other in-cycle Democratic senator in the entire country.
**So here's the hard and simple truth: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate, but only if we first win in Michigan.**
Those are the stakes. And with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing.
After we were outraised, a group of donors stepped up to match all donations that came in yesterday. But we still fell short of our goal last night. Thankfully, they extended that match opportunity, but only until midnight tonight. As of right now, we're still $4,789 short of what we need to win. If you're like me, you don't want to wake up on Election Day wishing you'd done more to take back the Senate.
So now I'm asking: Will you pitch in to help us win here in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats by giving $3 or more now? I'd really appreciate it. Every dollar will be doubled until midnight using this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email**](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk290-fr-in-nd-v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1094/574067800/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1093/574067800/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1092/574067800/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1091/574067800/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1094/574067800/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da845/5721a3ed/7085ce03/efb1093/574067800/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

subject: They know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200221-invite?refcode=em200221-invite&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") **"Republicans may need to win Minnesota to hold the Senate majority"** That's straight from an invitation to a high-dollar fundraiser hosted by Donald Trump Jr. in support of our opponent, Jason Lewis. These guys are coming after Tina's seat with everything they've got, and it's on us to stop them.

**Rush an urgent donation of $10 or more to help us fight back dollar for dollar with grassroots support to save Minnesota's Senate seat >>** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200221-invite?refcode=em200221-invite&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Donald Trump Jr. will be hosting a fundraiser for our opponent next week, and the event invitation reads: "Winning Minnesota may be critical to holding Republicans' slim 53-47 majority."

They know what we know, folks. Democrats have virtually no chance to flip the Senate without Minnesota, and Republicans must win here to guarantee their majority. That's why they are targeting our state and sending in the cavalry to help secure their victory in November.

But if we continue to work hard, hit our goals, and keep Minnesota blue, there's a very real chance we'll take the Senate back this year. So, we're asking:

**Will you make a contribution of $10 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline next week? We're behind on our goal and your donation could be the deciding factor in whether or not we will get back on track in time:**

clean_body: | "" "Republicans may need to win Minnesota to hold the Senate majority" That's straight from an invitation to a high-dollar fundraiser hosted by Donald Trump Jr. in support of our opponent, Jason Lewis. These guys are coming after Tina's seat with everything they've got, and it's on us to stop them. Rush an urgent donation of $10 or more to help us fight back dollar for dollar with grassroots support to save Minnesota's Senate seat >> If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Donald Trump Jr. will be hosting a fundraiser for our opponent next week, and the event invitation reads: "Winning Minnesota may be critical to holding Republicans' slim 53-47 majority." They know what we know, folks. Democrats have virtually no chance to flip the Senate without Minnesota, and Republicans must win here to guarantee their majority. That's why they are targeting our state and sending in the cavalry to help secure their victory in November. But if we continue to work hard, hit our goals, and keep Minnesota blue, there's a very real chance we'll take the Senate back this year. So, we're asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline next week? We're behind on our goal and your donation could be the deciding factor in whether or not we will get back on track in time: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Thanks for everything. It means a lot to have you with us. -- Team Tina

name: Sandy Smith
subject: It really is time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, Republican candidate for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015.

**Unlike the Republican establishment, I stuck with the President- through all of the media’s attempts to discredit him. **

_I am proud of what President Trump has done!_ I am a true warrior for the President and his MAGA agenda.

If you are proud of our President, as I am, [I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw) to defeat my Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!

Consider what President Trump has accomplished, in three short years, despite the treachery of the Swamp and the Democrats:

_-Record low unemployment. _

_-Record low Black and Hispanic unemployment. _

_-Record low female unemployment._

_-Dozens of conservative judges, remaking our Federal judiciary._

_-New, better trade agreements with Canada, Mexico, China, and other countries. _

_-Tax reforms and deregulation, paving the way for sustainable economic growth well into the future. _

_-Key terrorist leaders like al-Baghdadi and al-Soleimani killed!_

The fact is, with 65% of Americans better off today than four years ago, President Trump has done an amazing job. _**And he WILL win re-election, no matter what the Swamp says!**_

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished all of this with constant pushback from the Swamp. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Soviet Union!

Now, AOC and Bernie Sanders are trying to bring Cuba’s or Venezuela’s “corrupt Communism” to America.

I’m old enough to remember a time when Americans fought Communism, when Ronald Reagan won the Cold War over the Soviet Union, when America was the “Land of the Free”.

Now, the corrupt Republicans are mostly gone, and the Democrats are flat-out embracing Marxism.

Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw) most urgently!

That’s why it is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district - **which North Carolina’s First District now is**!

The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a general in Nancy Pelosi’s Congressional Socialist army. He is one of her deputy whips.

As one of Pelosi’s enforcers, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for some of the worst embarrassments of the do-nothing Democrat Congress over the last two years:

_-G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

_-He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these!_

_-Butterfield voted for open borders. He doesn’t want a wall, and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely - and let them vote!_

_-He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers!_

_\- G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi!_

This is no future for America. This voting record does not merit re-election in a swing district.

I have a different vision for America! I will always defend our Constitution, support President Trump, and fight for the values I hold dear - God, life, family, our rights and our liberties.

I owe it to our citizens to do what is best for the country. And that means running in North Carolina's 1st Congressional District against Democrat G. K. Butterfield.

G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He supports gun confiscation, socialism, abortion on demand up until birth, and open borders.

Why is Butterfield so extreme? _Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

Before the court-ordered redistricting, North Carolina’s First District was a D+36 district. It contained Durham, among other Dem strongholds.

That means that no credible Republicans ever challenged him.

_It means that the local media never challenged him. _

He is fat and happy, and doesn’t know HOW to fight. He never had to learn!

But this year, this district turned into a D+2 district. Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield. _They don’t know him- and they are Republicans!_

These are my neighbors. They won’t accept a liberal extremist like Butterfield. They are excited to come out and vote for President Trump and for me- because I will support the MAGA agenda in Congress!

_Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?_

The Dems have used the courts to cheat and choose their own voters to get rid of good Republicans the last few years. They took advantage of their new opportunities- that’s how you take Congress.

Here, we have a unique opportunity. A D+36 district got changed into a D+2 district overnight. **That means it’s a swing district** \- and a good Republican with working class appeal can flip this district!

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

__I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi!__ She and her insane leftist agenda can go to Hell!

**I am pro-America**. Democrats like AOC and Butterfield are anti-America. We will defeat them together- but only with your help!

Butterfield has half a million dollars of dirty Swamp money. But I have already raised $500,000 myself- and [with your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw), I will have the resources to beat him!

Pelosi takes her leftists wherever she can find them. It's time to fight back - together! [Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)

I need your help urgently to make sure Butterfield doesn’t bury me early. I need the resources to define him, inform voters- and win this crucial race!

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?

Think about it:

_-No impeachment.
-No tax hikes.
-No socialized medicine.
-No stifling regulations.
-No gun confiscations.
-No infanticide. _

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! **That’s keeping America great. **

That’s a Congress that will produce for us, instead of embarrassing us.

We need to stop impeachment and any Congressman who voted for it. [Let's save our country!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)

Can you help me take this swing district back, [with your maximum contribution](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw) of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

Can you [show your support](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw) of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make? Anything you can give is much appreciated!

I know there’s a lot of needs. Because of Pelosi’s extremism, there’s a lot of seats we can flip.

But taking out one of Pelosi’s leading generals would be a major, crippling blow to the American Left.

Without Butterfield, Pelosi will be without a right hand.

We can strike a crucial blow to the Dems by taking this seat back. Pelosi will never recover- which is OK by me!

[Your contribution will make a BIG difference here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw). Let’s go beat the Democrats together- with YOUR help!

Keep America Great!

[Can you help me](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw) beat Butterfield?

[Can you show your support of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)

Taking our country back starts right here. As always, [I am grateful for your support](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw).

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=tz6GMO1BWXBfgM.3brykUw)
---
P.S. Follow me on [Twitter](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=Fn6yDqPmOgb3rZhT.XDNqw) and like my [Facebook Page](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=vwaCKm61KqlJ5Pq6oQEmwQ). Also join my [Facebook group](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i020Hd7gWZNxmng&b=votaHDgAT6X4JiOckNBjcw). To mail checks or correspondence, send to Sandy Smith for Congress, P.O. Box 434, Winterville, NC 28590.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCys7CwMLGzM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCys7CwMLGzM)
